assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — branch provisioning (T1878) creates a new branch and returns reused=false on first spawn
assertionResults.title: creates a new branch and returns reused=false on first spawn

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — branch provisioning (T1878) reuses an existing task branch and returns reused=true
assertionResults.title: reuses an existing task branch and returns reused=true

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — branch provisioning (T1878) throws E_DIRTY_BRANCH when task branch has orphan commits not reachable from HEAD (T1927)
assertionResults.title: throws E_DIRTY_BRANCH when task branch has orphan commits not reachable from HEAD (T1927)

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — branch provisioning (T1878) deletes orphan branch and creates clean one when forceReset=true (T1927)
assertionResults.title: deletes orphan branch and creates clean one when forceReset=true (T1927)

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — location guard (T9809) creates a worktree at the canonical XDG path when CLEO_HOME is set
assertionResults.title: creates a worktree at the canonical XDG path when CLEO_HOME is set

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — location guard (T9809) throws E_WT_LOCATION_FORBIDDEN for a path outside canonical XDG root
assertionResults.title: throws E_WT_LOCATION_FORBIDDEN for a path outside canonical XDG root

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — location guard (T9809) CLEO_FORCE_LOCATION env var does NOT disable the guard (no escape hatch)
assertionResults.title: CLEO_FORCE_LOCATION env var does NOT disable the guard (no escape hatch)

assertionResults.fullName: createWorktree — location guard (T9809) guard error message includes the forbidden path and canonical root
assertionResults.title: guard error message includes the forbidden path and canonical root

assertionResults.fullName: installWorktreeDependencies (T9938) returns false when pnpm-lock.yaml does not exist in worktree
assertionResults.title: returns false when pnpm-lock.yaml does not exist in worktree

assertionResults.fullName: installWorktreeDependencies (T9938) returns true when node_modules already exists (idempotent)
assertionResults.title: returns true when node_modules already exists (idempotent)

assertionResults.fullName: installWorktreeDependencies (T9938) acquires and releases the lock file after pnpm install attempt
assertionResults.title: acquires and releases the lock file after pnpm install attempt

assertionResults.fullName: installWorktreeDependencies (T9938) creates per-worktree .npmrc when lockfile exists
assertionResults.title: creates per-worktree .npmrc when lockfile exists

assertionResults.fullName: installWorktreeDependencies (T9938) does not run when node_modules already exists (skips install)
assertionResults.title: does not run when node_modules already exists (skips install)
